reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect Firewalla
reauth_confirm.description: Enter a new personal access token for {name}.

data_description.token: A new personal access token for the Firewalla MSP API.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Firewalla
reconfigure.description: Current usage: {api_calls_summary}. Update the connection settings for {name}.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this Firewalla connection.
data_description.base_url: The Firewalla MSP base URL, for example {base_url_example}.
data_description.scope_type: Choose whether to connect to the whole MSP, a group, or a single box.
data_description.scope_id: The group ID or box ID for the selected scope type.
data_description.api_daily_request_limit: How many Firewalla API requests this entry may make per day.
data_description.scan_interval: How often Home Assistant should refresh Firewalla data.
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable only if your Firewalla uses a self-signed certificate.

user.title: Connect to Firewalla
user.description: Enter your Firewalla MSP URL and personal access token.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this Firewalla connection.
data_description.base_url: The Firewalla MSP base URL, for example {base_url_example}.
data_description.scope_type: Choose whether to connect to the whole MSP, a group, or a single box.
data_description.scope_id: The group ID or box ID for the selected scope type.
data_description.api_daily_request_limit: How many Firewalla API requests this entry may make per day.
data_description.scan_interval: How often Home Assistant should refresh Firewalla data.
data_description.traffic_window_minutes: How far back to look when building recent traffic summaries.
data_description.verify_ssl: Disable only if your Firewalla uses a self-signed certificate.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Firewalla API.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the personal access token.
error.missing_scope_id: A scope ID is required for group and box scopes.
error.unknown_box: The configured box ID was not found.

data_description.api_daily_request_limit: How many Firewalla API requests this entry may make per day.
data_description.scan_interval: How often Home Assistant should refresh Firewalla data.
data_description.traffic_window_minutes: How far back to look when building recent traffic summaries.
